testcase.name: test_login_with_valid_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (None == True or 'user' in {'email': 'info@manoprotect.com', 'name': 'ManoProtect Admin', 'picture': None, 'plan': 'enterprise', ...}) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb68cc03380>('success') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb68cc03380> = {'email': 'info@manoprotect.com', 'name': 'ManoProtect Admin', 'picture': None, 'plan': 'enterprise', ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_32.py:44: in test_login_with_valid_credentials assert data.get("success") == True or "user" in data E AssertionError: assert (None == True or 'user' in {'email': 'info@manoprotect.com', 'name': 'ManoProtect Admin', 'picture': None, 'plan': 'enterprise', ...}) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb68cc03380>('success') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb68cc03380> = {'email': 'info@manoprotect.com', 'name': 'ManoProtect Admin', 'picture': None, 'plan': 'enterprise', ...}.get
